serverInfo.name: Code Lieshout
serverInfo.description: WebMCP-enabled consultancy site. Tools are registered via navigator.modelContext in the browser on every page-load. An HTTP/SSE MCP transport at /mcp is planned for future agent-to-server use.

tools.name: scan_agent_readiness
tools.description: Scan a public URL against 19 agent-readiness standards and return score + failing checks.

tools.name: get_page_markdown
tools.description: Fetch a curated markdown version of a code-lieshout.nl page (/, /about, /portfolio, /ai-agents, /contact, /blog).

tools.name: list_site_sections
tools.description: Return the main navigable sections of code-lieshout.nl with URLs and descriptions.

tools.name: get_contact_info
tools.description: Return public contact information for Code Lieshout.
